metadata.description: Adspirer performance marketing plugins for Claude Code and Cowork. Manage ad campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, and TikTok.

plugins.name: adspirer-advertising-agent
plugins.description: Advertising agent for paid media: ad campaign management for Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), LinkedIn Ads, and TikTok Ads. 150+ tools for PPC keyword research, campaign creation, performance analysis, creative fatigue detection, and budget optimization.
